steps.title: Translate the quantity constraint
steps.content:
The teacher must order at least 20 items total. With x workbooks and y flash card sets, the total quantity is $x + y$. The phrase at least 20 means greater than or equal to 20.
$$x + y \geq 20$$

steps.title: Translate the cost constraint
steps.content:
Workbooks cost $\$3 each, and flash cards cost $\$4 per set, so the total cost is $3x + 4y$ dollars. The phrase must not be over \$80 means less than or equal to 80.
$$3x + 4y \leq 80$$

steps.title: Identify the matching system
steps.content:
The complete system of inequalities is:
  • $x + y \geq 20$ (quantity constraint)
  • $3x + 4y \leq 80$ (cost constraint)

That matches choice A — A is correct.
